steps.title: Add the known angles
steps.content:
Angles $J$ and $K$ each measure $42^\circ$, so together they measure
$$
42^\circ+42^\circ=84^\circ
$$

steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content: The angles in a triangle sum to $180^\circ$, so subtract the known angle total from $180^\circ$: $$ L=180^\circ-84^\circ $$ $$ L=96^\circ $$ The answer is B.
